message:
test(core): add unit tests for crispr and codons modules

- crispr.test.ts: 21 tests for CRISPR pressure analysis, spacer detection,
  Acr candidates, and pressure windows
- codons.test.ts: 48 tests for codon translation, reverse complement,
  GC content, and usage counting

Total: 69 new tests bringing overall count to 1044.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
